examples.root_cause: Target org has strict dependent picklist hierarchy (Market → Segment → Sub_Segment → Sub_Type) that rejects invalid combinations
Default PDF margins and column widths cause text wrapping and column truncation
Dependent picklist hierarchy restricts Sub_Type__c values based on Sub_Segment__c; 'Corrections Facility' is not valid for 'State Corrections' sub-segment
Org has duplicate detection rules that block Account creation for similar names
ACE skill data was 39.8 days stale (last updated 2025-12-13) with no visibility into freshness
Org has duplicate detection rules that block Account creation when similar names exist
Short agent names were not being auto-resolved to fully-qualified names (plugin:agent-name) before Task tool lookup
SOQL doesn't support division operations in SELECT clause with aggregate functions
Salesforce Tooling API requires Metadata field wrapper for FlowDefinition updates, sf CLI data update doesn't support this
ACE health check was looking for deprecated subagent-utilization-booster.sh instead of recognizing unified-router.sh consolidation
No proactive monitoring of routing-critical field population rates
No proactive monitoring of routing-critical field population rates
Commands (in commands/ directory) were being invoked as agents (via Task tool) instead of using Skill tool or slash command

Initial sfdc-automation-auditor agent run did not properly utilize the available programmatic extractors (process-builder-extractor.js, workflow-rule-extractor.js, validation-rule-auditor.js) and instead defaulted to claiming manual UI verification was required

Bash tool's command parameter doesn't reliably handle complex multiline syntax with loops and conditionals when passed as single string
Curl returns error HTML or empty response when API call fails, but exit code is 0. jq tries to parse non-JSON content. Also happens when environment variables are empty strings.

Disconnect between user expectation (full automation) and Claude's capability limitations (requires manual SQL execution). Additionally, when manual steps ARE needed, output doesn't prioritize copy-paste convenience.
SessionStart hooks only trigger when plugins are installed via /plugin install, not when working in the source repository. This is correct behavior but undocumented and non-obvious.

new_skills_discovered.name: Pursuit Contact Matching CSV Processing
new_skills_discovered.pattern: Extract specific columns from multi-column enrichment CSVs using Python csv module for proper quote handling

new_skills_discovered.name: Command vs Agent Detection
new_skills_discovered.pattern: Scan commands/ directories to build registry, check against registry before Task tool invocation, return helpful error with correct invocation method

new_skills_discovered.name: Skill Data Freshness Monitoring
new_skills_discovered.pattern: Check skill-data.json mtime, calculate days since last update, warn if >14 days stale, suggest /reflect to refresh

new_skills_discovered.name: Adaptive Table Orientation Selection
new_skills_discovered.pattern: Detect column count and automatically recommend portrait vs landscape

new_skills_discovered.name: Picklist Hierarchy Navigation
new_skills_discovered.pattern: Query existing records grouped by dependent picklist fields to discover valid combinations when picklist metadata is complex

new_skills_discovered.name: Inline Dashboard Chart Configuration
new_skills_discovered.pattern: When creating dashboard chart components, use useReportChart=false with inline <chartSummary> (aggregate, axisBinding, column) and explicit <groupingColumn> elements to avoid dependency on report chart definitions

new_skills_discovered.name: Disqualification Reason Pattern Analysis
new_skills_discovered.pattern: Analyze disqualification reasons against actual lead data to identify systematic mis-qualification patterns (e.g., 'International' leads with US market presence)

new_skills_discovered.name: Field Population Pre-Flight Check
new_skills_discovered.pattern: Before executing queries with filters, check population rates for filter fields and warn if below threshold

new_skills_discovered.name: Automation Audit Self-Verification
new_skills_discovered.pattern: When audit claims 'API limitations', challenge by exploring runbooks/scripts for existing extractors before accepting the limitation

new_skills_discovered.name: Marketo Smart List Documentation Pattern
new_skills_discovered.pattern: Since Marketo API cannot query smart list criteria, document manually: 1) Screenshot smart list tab, 2) Store in runbook with date, 3) Maintain change log for modifications, 4) Include expected filter checklist

new_skills_discovered.name: Field Population Health Monitoring
new_skills_discovered.pattern: For routing-critical fields, establish target population % thresholds and check frequency: Company (>95%), LeadSource (>90%), Annual Revenue (>60%), MQL_Date (>40%)

new_skills_discovered.name: Flow Entry Criteria Analysis
new_skills_discovered.pattern: Analyze flow <start> element for missing filterLogic/filters that could cause cascade failures on unrelated records

new_skills_discovered.name: Flow Version Activation via Tooling API
new_skills_discovered.pattern: Use REST PATCH to /tooling/sobjects/FlowDefinition/{id} with {Metadata:{activeVersionNumber:N}} to activate deployed flow versions

new_skills_discovered.name: Contract EndDate Adjustment via StartDate
new_skills_discovered.pattern: To change Contract EndDate, modify StartDate (EndDate = StartDate + ContractTerm - 1 day)

new_skills_discovered.name: Originating Opportunity Linkage Verification
new_skills_discovered.pattern: Query all Closed Won opportunities and verify ContractId is populated

new_skills_discovered.name: Audit Correction with Evidence Preservation
new_skills_discovered.pattern: When correcting audit findings: 1) Add correction notice at top of document, 2) Preserve original findings as 'legacy/superseded', 3) Add new section with corrected findings, 4) Include evidence trail

new_skills_discovered.name: Marketo Campaign Classification
new_skills_discovered.pattern: Classify Marketo campaigns by type (SFDC sync, funnel stage, object creation) and status (active/inactive) with last active date tracking

new_skills_discovered.name: Stuck Lead Detection
new_skills_discovered.pattern: Identify leads stuck in Marketo without SFDC sync by analyzing campaign status and lead metadata

new_skills_discovered.name: Asana Historical Task Backfill
new_skills_discovered.pattern: Create tasks with completed=true, due_on=historical_date, proper section membership, and assignee in single API call

new_skills_discovered.name: Asana UI [SFDC_ID]
new_skills_discovered.pattern: When user reports missing tasks, verify via API search first; common causes are completed task filters and collapsed sections

pending_improvements.reason: 149 records were blocked by duplicate rules, could be identified upfront
pending_improvements.suggestion: Add pre-import duplicate detection query as standard step

pending_improvements.reason: 37 Contacts failed due to pursuit_id__c uniqueness - discoverable before execution
pending_improvements.suggestion: Add unique constraint pre-check for UPDATE operations

pending_improvements.reason: Performance optimization for high-frequency Task tool usage
pending_improvements.suggestion: Add caching for resolved names to avoid repeated lookups

pending_improvements.reason: Prevent formatting issues before PDF generation
pending_improvements.suggestion: Add pre-flight validation for table dimensions

pending_improvements.reason: Deployed chart components that failed silently in UI due to missing report charts
pending_improvements.suggestion: Add pre-validation step to check useReportChart setting against report chart existence

pending_improvements.reason: Would have caught AnnualRevenue issue upfront instead of requiring query iteration
pending_improvements.suggestion: Add automatic field population check before applying filters on non-standard fields

pending_improvements.reason: Initial audit incorrectly claimed API limitations when extractors existed
pending_improvements.suggestion: Always execute Tooling API queries and include query evidence in reports; never claim 'manual verification required' without first attempting programmatic retrieval

pending_improvements.reason: Field gaps are primary cause of routing failures but not currently checked in standard audit
pending_improvements.suggestion: Include routing-critical field population analysis as standard audit component

pending_improvements.reason: Current runbooks document what exists but not how to diagnose failures
pending_improvements.suggestion: Add Routing Diagnostics Playbook template as standard runbook section

pending_improvements.reason: Deployed flows default to Draft status, causing confusion when changes don't take effect
pending_improvements.suggestion: Add automatic post-deploy activation check and prompt

pending_improvements.reason: Current agent doesn't handle backfill scenarios well - required manual API calls
pending_improvements.suggestion: Add batch task creation with historical dates support

pending_improvements.reason: Agent used wrong purple (#6B2D5C vs #5F3B8C) causing user [SFDC_ID]
pending_improvements.suggestion: Auto-read CSS variables from revpal-brand.css instead of relying on prompt-specified hex codes

pending_improvements.reason: User had to catch the Closed Won issue manually
pending_improvements.suggestion: Add automatic stage check as first step - reject Closed Won/Lost before gathering other evidence

pending_improvements.reason: User had to manually check after duplicates were identified; should be built-in
pending_improvements.suggestion: Add automatic financial value comparison to duplicate detection output

pending_improvements.reason: BDU Checkin constraint was discovered mid-execution; should be automatic
pending_improvements.suggestion: Add child-record dependency check as standard pre-flight validation

pending_improvements.reason: Standard fuzzy matching scores poorly on abbreviated vs full names (65% for 'PD' vs 'Police Department')
pending_improvements.suggestion: Add abbreviation normalization as built-in pre-processing step

pending_improvements.reason: files.upload is deprecated and returns method_deprecated error
pending_improvements.suggestion: Update all Slack upload scripts to use new API pattern

pending_improvements.reason: User needed this info to make informed deactivation decision
pending_improvements.suggestion: Include CreatedDate and CreatedBy fields by default in inactive user reports

pending_improvements.reason: md-to-pdf has fundamental limitations with image embedding that cannot be reliably worked around
pending_improvements.suggestion: Add Playwright-based rendering as primary method for documents with diagrams

pending_improvements.reason: WSL2 Chrome sessions frequently conflict with Playwright persistent context
pending_improvements.suggestion: Add automatic API fallback when Playwright browser fails to launch

recommendations.message: 398 skills have low confidence and need improvement
Recurring error patterns detected that should be addressed
476 new skill patterns discovered - consider adding to skill registry
